response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive full-stack experience with strong TypeScript, React, and relational database skills, aligning well with the role's requirements. His background in energy/environmental projects (e.g., GISCollective) and AI-agent infrastructure is a valuable overlap with the renewable energy/construction technology domain. However, his recent focus on AI and non-traditional tech stacks (e.g., Dlang) may require some adjustment to the job's PostgreSQL/Nest.js priorities.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and Node.js experience with full-stack development across multiple projects.
Proven track record in scalable systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation platform handling millions of mails annually).
Relevant domain experience in energy/environmental platforms (GISCollective) and AI integration.
concerns: Limited recent experience with PostgreSQL (primary requirement) compared to MongoDB and other databases.
Most recent roles emphasize AI-agent infrastructure over traditional web architecture (React/Nest.js).
High seniority (Staff/ Senior roles) may lead to overqualification for an entry-level position.
